headlines.title: Man arrested on suspicion of attempted murder after 'brutal' knife attack in Belfast
headlines.description: Police say a man in his 30s, who is believed to be Somali, is in custody as Keir Starmer calls the incident "sickening".

headlines.title: 'I was a prisoner in my home': Drug gangs 'cuckooing' hundreds of homes a week, police warn
headlines.description: Hundreds if not thousands of people's homes are being taken over by UK gangs every week, say police.

headlines.title: Football regulator contacts West Ham over 'serious allegations' against Sullivan
headlines.description: Multiple women accuse the billionaire of abusing his power and preying on them for sex, in some cases when they were in their late teens.

headlines.title: 300 migrants bound for UK kidnapped and threatened with kidney removal
headlines.description: The Iraqi Kurds were captured by a militia who demanded a ransom of $5,000 (£3,700) per person.

headlines.title: Legal equality duty for public services should be scrapped, says Badenoch
headlines.description: The Conservative leader will argue that the rules have become a "minefield that exposes almost every significant public decision to legal challenge".

headlines.title: Ben Stokes and Gus Atkinson investigated over nightclub incident
headlines.description: An incident at a nightclub involving England cricket captain Ben Stokes, pace bowler Gus Atkinson and a Saracens academy player is being investigated by the England and Wales Cricket Board and the Prem Rugby club.

headlines.title: Teen charged over Golders Green ambulance attack
headlines.description: Subhan Ahmed, 18, is charged with assisting an offender after four Jewish ambulances were burnt out.

headlines.title: SpaceX's stock market blast-off could be Musk's biggest gamble yet
headlines.description: SpaceX is preparing for a stock market debut that could transform the company, the wider market and Elon Musk's fortune.

headlines.title: Somali referee Artan barred from entering US ahead of World Cup
headlines.description: Omar Artan, who was set to be the first Somali to referee at the World Cup finals, is dropped from the list of officials after he was denied entry to the United States.

headlines.title: Driving test booking rules tightened after thousands of no shows
headlines.description: Learner drivers can only swap their test to the three centres nearest to their original booking.

headlines.title: Russia's fuel crisis intensifies as Ukraine steps up strikes on occupied territories
headlines.description: Kyiv has made it difficult for Moscow to provide military and civilian supplies to the territories it occupies.

headlines.title: I thought I'd got my dream flat - so did 23 others
headlines.description: Student Mide Awosika pays thousands for a flat rental deposit - and discovers many others also did.

headlines.title: Billionaire West Ham co-owner accused of abusing his power and preying on women for sex
headlines.description: Women say David Sullivan told them they needed to have sex with him to feature in his newspapers.

headlines.title: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
headlines.description: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.

headlines.title: Trump tells BBC Netanyahu did not defy him
headlines.description: In a call with the US president, the BBC’s Sarah Smith asked Trump about the war in Iran and his relationship with the Israeli leader.

headlines.title: Israel and Iran flare-up could strengthen Tehran's negotiating hand
headlines.description: Iran appears emboldened by the outcome and its leaders may sense Trump's appetite for risk is low.

headlines.title: Why super-sized and politicised World Cup comes at a cost
headlines.description: Whatever one's perspective, it seems certain that away from the on-field spectacle, this super-sized World Cup could be among the most contentious ever.

headlines.title: I wrote a poem about my son - years later it appeared on his exam paper
headlines.description: Emily Cullen says she couldn't believe it when her son told her about the poem, which she had written seven years earlier.

headlines.title: Schoolgirl arrested after three hurt in knife attack
headlines.description: Three people suffer knife wounds and a pupil is arrested at the school in Blackley.

headlines.title: 'Lives still at risk' from unregulated baby sleep industry after BBC investigation
headlines.description: 'Families deserve clarity about the qualifications and training of those caring for their children'

headlines.title: World Cup tickets for Iran fans revoked, the country's football body says
headlines.description: Iran's football federation says its allocation of tickets for the group stage of the World Cup has been revoked just days before the tournament.

headlines.title: Trump booed in New York as he becomes first US president to attend NBA Finals
headlines.description: The catcalls came after ticketholders faced airport-style security to enter the venue at Madison Square Garden.

headlines.title: Hundreds of aftershocks jolt Philippines as officials say death toll could rise
headlines.description: Dozens of people are dead and hundreds more injured following an earthquake in the country's south.

headlines.title: Total of 135 people make compensation claims over care home abuse
headlines.description: A BBC investigation reveals a report detailing the scale of abuse and neglect at a children's home.

headlines.title: Anita Manning's auction house criticised for offering human remains
headlines.description: Human bones, including a skull, were to go under the hammer on Friday, but Great Western Auctions has now withdrawn the item.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Jess Phillips On The Explicit Image Ban For Children
headlines.description: Starmer has told tech firms to block naked images on phones for children.

headlines.title: Americanswers… on 5 Live! Why did Trump walk out of his TV interview with Meet The Press?
headlines.description: And why is JD Vance posting about Henry Nowak?

headlines.title: Why super-sized and politicised World Cup comes at a cost
headlines.description: Whatever one's perspective, it seems certain that away from the on-field spectacle, this super-sized World Cup could be among the most contentious ever.

headlines.title: Tickets for Iran fans revoked, says federation
headlines.description: Iran's football federation says its allocation of tickets for the group stage of the World Cup has been revoked just days before the tournament.

headlines.title: 'Mazadona', 'Einstein', 'The Ant' - 20 new players to watch at World Cup
headlines.description: BBC Sport TV and radio commentators pick the players they think could be the breakout stars of the 2026 World Cup.

headlines.title: Champion Maria asks for respect after Queen's snub
headlines.description: Tatjana Maria says Queen's should show more respect to its defending champions after she goes through qualifying to reach the main draw.

headlines.title: Play BBC Sport's new World Cup predictor game
headlines.description: Play BBC Sport's new World Cup predictor game to be in with the chance of winning a signed football.

headlines.title: 'Diogo will be with you' - Jota's widow writes to Robertson
headlines.description: Diogo Jota's widow urges Scotland captain Andrew Robertson to carry his former Liverpool team-mate "in your heart" when he plays at the World Cup.

headlines.title: RFU council member resigns over Alphonsi post
headlines.description: Rugby Football Union council member Matthew Smith resigns after posting discriminatory criticism of television pundit Maggie Alphonsi.
